details.test: Task 1: Select office plan for 60 employees with card payments and request quote
Task 2: Configure 8-item snack assortment under $2 with >=3 healthy items and request quote
Task 3: Filter machines for ZIP 10001 and submit installation request with next-month date
Task 4: Submit maintenance request for coin jam with earliest morning slot
Task 5: Calculate revenue estimate and send via contact form
Task 6: Compare <=40" snack machines and request quote for higher-capacity model
Task 7: Configure vegan-only machine with 10 items under $3 and >=4 nut-free
Task 8: Find Chicago service area and submit contact form for that office
Task 9: Choose best new customer promotion and submit promotion request
